_comment: Passenger Car Unit (PCU) equivalency factors per canonical vehicle category.
_source: IRC SP-41-1994 (Guidelines for the Design of At-Grade Intersections in Rural and Urban Areas), supplemented by IRC 106-1990 for mixed-traffic conditions. Conservative middle values chosen where ranges differ between references.
_fallback_note: Unmapped vehicle types default to car (1.0 PCU) — surfaced as vehicle_mapping_coverage in /health endpoint.
